TechnologyStack.Framework: None — custom modular CLI with source-based module loading

dep.name: curl
dep.purpose: HTTP client for LLM API calls (SSE streaming + standard)

dep.name: python3
dep.purpose: JSON parsing (jq not guaranteed on macOS), response extraction, json.dumps() for control char escaping in _json_escape_string

dep.name: du/df
dep.purpose: Disk usage measurement with timeout guards

dep.name: find
dep.purpose: File scanning for build artifacts and cleanable items

constraint.reason: macOS ships bash 3.2; user may install 5.x via homebrew
f-strings used in JSON parsing scripts

module-level.focus: Unit tests for collector, config, JSON parsing, prompt generation

wave-level.focus: Syntax validation after every edit wave

phase-level.focus: Static analysis for common bash pitfalls

manual-verification.focus: Inspect collector output without API call

Testing.mocking-policy: No mocking framework. Test against real filesystem with temp dirs. Use --dry-run for collector verification.

Observability.logger: echo/printf to stderr with color codes
Observability.log-prefix: No structured log format. Pipeline UI stages: Collect → Analyze → Report → Select → Execute. Step-based progress via _step/_step_ok/_step_fail.
Observability.error-channels: stderr for errors, warnings, and pipeline UI. stdout for collector data and streaming response.
Observability.redaction: API key never logged. MO_DEBUG=1 enables verbose output.

DeliveryShape.shape: Single-user CLI tool. No daemon. No database. Config in ~/.config/mole/ai.conf. Report cache in ~/.config/mole/advisor/. Temp files in /tmp/.

ReasoningModelNotes.behavior: Outputs analysis in delta.reasoning_content SSE field. Final response in delta.content. May spend most tokens on reasoning before generating content.

mitigations.mitigation-1: max_tokens=16384 (not 4096) to ensure content generation completes
mitigations.mitigation-2: client.sh parses both reasoning_content and content fields _strip_reasoning filters reasoning text from response before rendering timeout=300s for slow reasoning models
